label: content
narrative: Section 09-01 '数値の数え方' with two figure entries for binary-to-decimal and decimal-to-binary conversion examples. Figure diagrams are not transcribed (expected Mistral limitation, not a defect). Captions zh '将二进制的「100」「111」转换为十进制的计算示例' and en 'Calculation example for converting binary "100" and "111" to decimal' are faithful and informative.
